name: frame-runtime-animated-map
description: Frame-runtime port of SlideMotion's animated-map — SVG fallback path only (T-131d.4). Pans an eased camera from a start lat/lng to an end lat/lng, sweeps a dashed route line between two baked SVG anchor points, and pulses a ring around the advancing dot. The reference's optional mapbox-gl real-tiles path is deliberately not ported (network fetches + imperative useEffect mutation violate frame-runtime determinism).
